summary: Service Layer Wiring & SystemHealthDashboard - COMPLETE SUCCESS. All 33 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend SystemHealthDashboard page fully functional with all 9 API integrations, 4 MetricCards, 4 main panels (Channel Manager, Queue & Workers, Security Runtime, Runtime Alerts), 6 runtime metrics, and interactive buttons (Refresh, Drift Scan, Run Reconciliation).
critical_code_review_comments: Service layer pattern correctly implemented: router → service → repository
CMRuntimeService, WorkerRuntimeService, SecurityRuntimeService all properly wired
Common contracts (ServiceResult, OperationContext, DomainError) working correctly
All 6 domain schemas (admin, channel_manager, guest, revenue, sales, pms) properly extracted and importable
SystemHealthDashboard UI well designed with dark theme, proper data-testid attributes
All 9 API endpoints integrated: runtime status, queues health, audit status, rate-limit status, tenant-guard status, log-sanitization status, runtime alerts, runtime metrics, stuck tasks

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, all interactions working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service layer refactoring complete. All 24 hardening endpoints now use router → service → repository pattern. CMRuntimeService delegates to drift_detector, reconciliation_engine, sync_scheduler, provider_failover. WorkerRuntimeService delegates to task_status_service, queue_monitor. SecurityRuntimeService delegates to audit_validator, tenant_rate_limiter, credential_guard, tenant_guard, log_sanitizer. Frontend SystemHealthDashboard at /system-health route working correctly with all data-testid attributes.

backend_cm_hardening: GET /api/channel-manager/runtime/status - returns health, sync_stats, drift, reconciliation, providers
backend_worker_hardening: GET /api/workers/queues/health - returns health, pending, stuck, saturation_pct
backend_observability: GET /api/observability/runtime/metrics - returns sync, drift, queue metrics
frontend_system_health: Channel Manager panel shows Healthy badge and Drift Scan button
Queue & Workers panel shows health metrics (pending, processing, failed, saturation, stuck)
Security Runtime panel shows audit completeness, rate limiting, tenant guard, log sanitization
Runtime Alerts panel shows 'No active alerts'
Runtime Metrics section shows 6 metric cards (Sync Lag, Drift Count, Recon Rate, Queue Backlog, Violations, Total Alerts)
Refresh button (refresh-all-btn) works and updates data
